title: ophrys × sancti-ligorii
intro: Ophrys × sancti-ligorii, also known as the Holy Ghost orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys insectifera and Ophrys sphegodes. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × sancti-ligorii include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as tinctures, to utilize its medicinal properties.
